data.title: Home Bancshares (HOMB) to release Q4 earnings on Jan. 14 with expected EPS of 60 cents, revenue $272.48 million. Acquires Mountain Commerce Bancorp for $150.1 million. Stock price fell 1% to $28.45.
data.description: Home Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, January 14th. Analysts are anticipating earnings of 60 cents per share for this quarter, showing an improvement from the 50 cents per share reported in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for the company's quarterly revenue stands at $272.48 million, up from $260.76 million in the previous year. In a recent development, Home Bancshares confirmed its acquisition of Mountain Commerce Bancorp for $150.1 million on December 8th. Following this news, the company's shares dipped by 1% to close at $28.45 on Friday. For further insights, interested readers can find comprehensive details, including analyst ratings, on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: ParaZero Technologies achieved major milestones in Precision Airdrops by transforming battlefield lessons into life-saving technology in 2025.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO) based in Kfar Saba, Israel, a leading aerospace defense company, is celebrating a successful 2025 for its innovative DropAir™ Precision Airdrop System. The company, known for its smart and autonomous solutions for both manned and unmanned aerial systems (UAS) globally, has adapted lessons from recent military conflicts to develop life-saving technology. The DropAir™ system, initially designed for military use, is now being expanded into civilian, medical, and humanitarian sectors around the world. This move signifies ParaZero's commitment to utilizing its expertise in the defense industry to address a broader range of global challenges.

data.title: Ditto joins Zebra Technologies' PartnerConnect program to enhance customer service and expertise. Resilient edge computing database solution.
data.description: Ditto, a trailblazer in edge computing and peer-to-peer data synchronization, unveiled its involvement in Zebra’s PartnerConnect program today in Atlanta. This program, known for its excellence in empowering partners to expand, enhance expertise, and better assist customers, has garnered awards and is esteemed in the industry. Zebra Technologies, the host of the program, provides a base for innovation and growth opportunities. Ditto specializes in an edge-native mobile database, offering robust offline-first solutions. The announcement marks a significant step for Ditto as it joins a renowned program to further its reach and capabilities.

data.title: Google and Shopify introduced AI-based "agentic" shopping at NRF 2026. Google's stock surged by 65% in 2025, may drive e-commerce growth.
data.description: During the NRF 2026 event, Google and Shopify unveiled innovative projects in AI-driven "agentic" shopping. Google's stocks saw a significant increase of 65% in 2025. The collaboration between Google and Shopify is anticipated to catalyze a surge in agentic commerce, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Article features inspirational quotes from prominent figures including Susan Choi, Michael Jordan. Provides insights on effort, responsibility, creativity.
data.description: Explore motivational quotes encouraging hard work, accountability, and innovation. Quotes featured include wisdom from Susan Choi, Michael Jordan, and various other notable figures. The article can be found on Investor's Business Daily's website.

data.title: GardaWorld announces financial guidance for fiscal year ending January 31, 2026, in Canadian dollars.
data.description: The figures provided in this announcement are stated in Canadian dollars. On January 12, 2026, Garda World Security Corporation (referred to as "GardaWorld" or the "Company") in Montréal, aims to establish worldwide leaders in security services, integrating AI technology for enhanced security measures.

data.title: Royalty Pharma to share business update and accomplishments at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 13, 2026. 12:45pm ET / 9:45am PT.
data.description: Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) issued a business performance update, highlighting recent achievements. Pablo Legorreta, CEO and Chairman, will present these updates on Jan. 13, 2026, during a webcast at the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference at 12:45 p.m. Eastern Time / 9:45 a.m. Pacific Time. This announcement comes from New York on Jan. 12, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum trade flat, XRP and Dogecoin slide 2% after ETF outflows. BTC price at $90,446.61, liquidations at $211.88 million in 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs see $250 million outflows, Ethereum ETFs $93.8 million. Market sentiment is neutral.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently being traded at approximately $90,000, with the broader sentiment in the cryptocurrency market staying neutral despite favorable macroeconomic conditions. Liquidations have reached $211.88 million within the past 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs experienced $250 million in net outflows on Friday, while Ethereum ETFs saw $93.8 million in net outflows. Prices for select cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin at $90,446.61, Ethereum at $3,108.44, Solana at $139.44, and XRP at $2.03. Crypto analyst Jelle observed that Bitcoin is consolidating near the $90,500 mark, testing it repeatedly from above as investors anticipate comments from Powell. Regaining the $93,500 level is seen as crucial. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bavarian Nordic A/S launching share buy-back program of up to DKK 150 million from Jan 7 to Feb 13, 2026, in accordance with EU regulations.
data.description: The company Bavarian Nordic A/S (OMX: BAVA) based in Copenhagen, Denmark, has revealed details about its share buy-back program established on January 7, 2026. Within the program, the company plans to repurchase shares amounting to a maximum of DKK 150 million. This repurchase initiative is scheduled to take place between January 7, 2026, and February 13, 2026. The execution of this program complies with the regulations outlined in Regulation (EU) No. 596/2014 and Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 of the European Parliament and Council on market abuse, collectively known as the Safe Harbour Regulation.

data.title: EQT Life Sciences invests USD 103M in Kinaset Therapeutics to advance inhaled therapeutic for respiratory diseases.
data.description: A recent development in the biopharmaceutical sector involves EQT Life Sciences making an investment in Kinaset Therapeutics, a clinical-stage company in the U.S. specializing in developing an innovative inhaled therapeutic for treating severe respiratory conditions. The investment comes as part of a successful Series B funding round that raised a total of $103 million. These funds will be used to progress the development of frevecitinib, the flagship product of Kinaset Therapeutics aimed at addressing respiratory illnesses.

data.title: OrthoPediatrics Corp. achieved record revenue of $236.1M in 2025, a 15% increase from prior year, and issued 2026 guidance.
data.description: Records indicate that in the fiscal year of 2025, the company attained a remarkable milestone with a record-breaking annual revenue of $236.1 million, showcasing a notable growth rate of 15% compared to the previous year. Moreover, the company has set the stage for substantial progress in the upcoming year by introducing projections for achieving an all-time high in Adjusted EBITDA for 2026.

data.title: Lilac & Traxys sign 10-year offtake deal for Great Salt Lake lithium, advancing project towards construction.
data.description: In Oakland, Calif. & New York, Lilac Solutions, a prominent direct lithium extraction technology provider, and Traxys North America, a top global trader in metals and resources, have revealed a significant development. They have formalized a 10-year binding contract for lithium carbonate produced at Lilac's facility in Utah's Great Salt Lake. This milestone deal is crucial for progressing the project towards construction and outlining a definitive commercial route for the production.

data.title: Global Payments acquires Worldpay and divests issuer solutions, forming top commerce solutions provider.
data.description: In Atlanta, Global Payments has successfully completed the acquisition of Worldpay. The transaction involved a significant amount of money, with the acquisition valued at a staggering amount. Additionally, Global Payments has also divested its Issuer Solutions Business as part of this strategic move. This acquisition marks a major milestone for Global Payments as they continue to expand their presence in the global payments industry.

data.title: HMS Networks AB will release its Q4 2025 report on January 27, 2026, at 07:30 CET. Join the conference call.
data.description: HMS Networks AB (publ) is scheduled to unveil its Q4 2025 financial report on Tuesday, January 27, 2026, at 07:30 CET.

data.title: Subaru taps into Dynamic Map Platform's HD Map Data for upgraded EyeSight® tech in cars, enhancing safety features.
data.description: In recent data provided, it was reported that the global economic growth rate for this year is projected to be around 5.6%, showcasing a notable increase from the previous forecast of 4.3%. This upward revision is primarily attributed to the swift recovery witnessed in various sectors following the pandemic-induced downturn. Furthermore, it was highlighted that advanced economies are showing a growth rate of approximately 4.4%, while emerging markets and developing economies are expected to grow by 6.1%. On the employment front, an estimated 110 million jobs have been regained worldwide since the peak of the crisis, although this figure still falls short of the pre-pandemic levels. It was also pointed out that inflation rates have risen in numerous nations, with consumer price indexes escalating by an average of 2.3%. This surge, largely driven by soaring energy and commodity prices, has prompted concerns about potential economic challenges in the near future. Amid these developments, policymakers are closely monitoring the situation and implementing strategies to ensure sustained economic recovery and stability.

data.title: Kyivstar starts 5G pilot program in Lviv, Ukraine with the launch of a test zone in the historical center, the company's first local 5G project under the Ministry of Digital Transformation.
data.description: In Ukraine's capital city of Kyiv, on January 12, 2026, Kyivstar, the country's top digital operator, introduced a 5G trial area in Lviv's historic district. This initiative signifies the company's inaugural domestic 5G trial effort, carried out in accordance with guidelines provided by the Ministry of Digital Transformation of Ukraine. Kyivstar, listed on Nasdaq as KYIV and KYIVW, is at the forefront of this technological advancement, demonstrating their commitment to innovation and progress in the telecommunications sector.
